perturbation.original_text: Territory shall mean the world with the exception of the following countries which are expressly reserved by W2E: Spain, Italy and Canada.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the list of countries (Spain, Italy, and Canada) expressly reserved by W2E, the definition of 'Territory' is broadened to include these countries. This contradicts Clause 6.1, which states that W2E will use reasonable endeavors to procure a SHBV Boiler forms part of the Engineered Solution implemented for a W2E Customer within the Territory. With the change made to the territory definition, this implies W2E is obligated to do so in Spain, Italy, and Canada, when the original agreement had expressly reserved those territories.
perturbation.contradicted_text: W2E agrees that it will use reasonable endeavours to procure that a SHBV Boiler, and where applicable, a primary chamber, a secondary chamber and an economiser (in each case as supplied by SHBV as contemplated by Clause 5.2), forms part of the Engineered Solution implemented for a W2E Customer within the Territory. W2E shall have no obligations under this Clause where a W2E Customer elects for whatever reason not to include a SHBV Boiler, a primary chamber, a secondary chamber or an economiser supplied by SHBV as part of the Engineered Solution or directs W2E to utilise an alternative product.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly excludes Spain, Italy, and Canada from the 'Territory' definition. The changed text broadens the definition to include these countries. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that W2E will use reasonable endeavors to procure a SHBV Boiler forms part of the Engineered Solution implemented for a W2E Customer within the Territory. By removing the exclusion, W2E is now obligated to do so in Spain, Italy, and Canada, which directly impacts and contradicts their original obligation as stated in the contradicted text. This represents a strong and direct contradiction based on the omission of critical language as defined in the prompt.

perturbation.original_text: W2E Equipment means products, plant and equipment to be manufactured pursuant to the Manufacturing Agreement and which may incorporate W2E Technology, including as specified in Schedule 1 of this Agreement; and W2E Technology means 'W2E's proprietary technology for the destruction of waste through gasification and the conversion of latent energy into thermal energy.
perturbation.changed_text: W2E Equipment means products, plant and equipment to be manufactured pursuant to the Manufacturing Agreement and which may incorporate W2E Technology; and W2E Technology means 'W2E's proprietary technology for the destruction of waste through gasification and the conversion of latent energy into thermal energy.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'including as specified in Schedule 1 of this Agreement' from the definition of 'W2E Equipment', there is now a contradiction because clause 5.1 states: SHBV agrees that it shall manufacture and supply to W2E (or as it shall direct), W2E Equipment, in each case in accordance with the terms of the manufacturing agreement ('Manufacturing Agreement') to be entered into by the Parties on or following the entry into this Agreement. However, without the Schedule 1 reference, it is unclear what specifications must be included in the 'Manufacturing Agreement', and which specifications must be followed when manufacturing W2E equipment
perturbation.contradicted_text: SHBV agrees that it shall manufacture and supply to W2E (or as it shall direct), W2E Equipment, in each case in accordance with the terms of the manufacturing agreement ("Manufacturing Agreement") to be entered into by the Parties on or following the entry into this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The removal of 'including as specified in Schedule 1 of this Agreement' from the definition of 'W2E Equipment' directly contradicts clause 5.1, which states that SHBV will manufacture W2E Equipment according to the Manufacturing Agreement. Without the Schedule 1 reference, it's unclear what specifications are to be included in the Manufacturing Agreement, creating an ambiguity that directly impacts SHBV's obligation and making the contract internally inconsistent. This is an Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Parties agree that they shall on or following the date of this Agreement, enter into the Manufacturing Agreement which shall govern the manner and terms upon which they will co-operate and fulfil their respective obligations to each other relating to the W2E Equipment and the SHBV Technologies (including the quantity of SHBV Boilers, primary chambers, secondary chambers and economisers that SHBV shall supply, their price and timetable for delivery).
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties agree that they shall on or following the date of this Agreement, enter into the Manufacturing Agreement which shall govern the manner and terms upon which they will co-operate and fulfil their respective obligations to each other relating to the W2E Equipment and the SHBV Technologies.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase '(including the quantity of SHBV Boilers, primary chambers, secondary chambers and economisers that SHBV shall supply, their price and timetable for delivery)' from Clause 7.1, the manufacturing agreement no longer clearly defines essential supply terms. This creates a contradiction because Section 5.2 indicates that SHBV agrees at the request of W2E, to supply SHBV Boilers, as well as primary chambers, secondary chambers and economises to such persons as W2E shall nominate, on the terms specified in or otherwise agreed to by the Parties. Therefore, with the changes made to section 7.1, it creates uncertainty about the enforceability of these terms mentioned in section 5.2
perturbation.contradicted_text: SHBV agrees that it shall at the request of W2E, supply (and if requested, install) SHBV Boilers, as well as primary chambers, secondary chambers and economises (which SHBV agrees to manufacture and supply) to such persons as W2E shall nominate, on the terms specified in or otherwise agreed to by the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly mentioned the terms (quantity, price, and delivery timetable) to be governed by the Manufacturing Agreement. The changed text removes this explicit mention, creating uncertainty about whether these terms are indeed governed by the Manufacturing Agreement. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that SHBV will supply the boilers, chambers, and economizers on terms specified or otherwise agreed to by the parties. The removal of the explicit mention in the changed text creates ambiguity regarding the enforceability of the terms referenced in the contradicted text, creating a clear contradiction.
